description: Correct three patient records in the MedinTux database (MySQL, user: root, no password, db: DrTuxTest) where the Last Name and First Name fields were swapped. The records to correct are: 'Sophie MARTIN', 'Thomas PETIT', and 'Lucas DUBOIS' (currently stored with first names in the last name field and vice versa). Update the existing records in both the 'IndexNomPrenom' and 'fchpat' tables. Do not delete and re-create the records, as unique identifiers (GUIDs) must be preserved to maintain links to medical history.
